news.headline: Digital Ally, Inc. closed a $15.0 million public offering on Feb 14, 2025, allowing them to fund future endeavors.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Digital Ally, Inc. (Nasdaq: DGLY) successfully completed a firm commitment underwritten public offering, generating gross proceeds of around $15.0 million for the company. This capital will be used for the development, manufacturing, and marketing of advanced video recording products and safety equipment across various sectors such as law enforcement, emergency management, fleet safety, and event security. The offering officially closed on the same date.

news.headline: Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston reports $82.1M net income for Q4 and $290.5M for 2024, declares dividend.
news.summary: In Boston on February 14, 2025, the Federal Home Loan Bank shared its initial unaudited financial outcomes for 2024. They disclosed a net income of $82.1 million for the fourth quarter and $290.5 million for the entire year. The Bank is preparing to submit its annual financial report for further review.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: We are ready to move as quickly as possible towards real peace.
Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: US & Ukraine teams are to continue work on a critical minerals deal.
Tevogen Bio celebrates 1-year listing anniversary by sharing 2024 financing activity; listed on Nasdaq as TVGN.
news.summary: Tevogen Bio, a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech company based in Warren, N.J., recently shared details regarding its 2024 financing activities to mark its one-year presence on the Nasdaq exchange. The company, also known as Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc., is listed as Nasdaq: TVGN. This update was released on February 14, 2025.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices for BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL, BNB, DOGE, ADA, LINK, AVAX, SUI on 2/14 analyzed.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the total number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the country has reached 100,000, with an additional 1,000 cases recorded in the last 24 hours. The death toll has also risen to 5,000, with 50 new fatalities reported. Health officials have emphasized the importance of following safety measures, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to prevent further spread of the virus. The government has announced plans to ramp up testing and contact tracing efforts in highly affected areas. Additionally, hospitals are working to increase their capacity to accommodate the rising number of patients.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy: I had a good meeting with US VP Vance.
AI in Games market projected to grow by USD 27.47 Billion (2025-2029), CAGR 42.3%, driven by AR and VR adoption - Technavio
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on the market, specifically focusing on the artificial intelligence (AI) in games sector. This market is projected to increase by USD 27.47 billion between 2025 and 2029. The growth rate is expected to maintain a steady pace, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 42.3% forecasted for this period.

news.headline: White House to establish council for boosting energy dominance under Trump administration
22 counterparties take $58.770b at the Fed reverse repo operation.
Turkey Bridge Construction Market experiencing significant growth, driven by urbanization and government initiatives. 270 projects completed.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Turkey Bridge Construction Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market in Turkey has seen notable growth recently, attributed to factors like increasing urbanization, government projects, and a flourishing infrastructure industry. Significant contributions from public and private investments have been pivotal, resulting in Turkey successfully finishing 270 Projects. This growth trend is expected to continue, with a positive forecast for the industry's future growth, competitiveness, and revenue.

news.headline: Moneyspire releases 2025 software to enhance personal finance management, aiming for global user convenience.
news.summary: In Lakewood, California on February 14, 2025, a renowned personal finance software company, Moneyspire, revealed the introduction of their newest software update for the year 2025. This upgraded release aims to improve financial management for users globally by enhancing intuitiveness, efficiency, and security.

news.headline: TigerDC appoints Mehmet Akcin to its Board of Directors to drive innovation in AI-ready data centers.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, TigerDC, a prominent company specializing in AI-focused data center infrastructure, excitedly revealed the addition of Mehmet Akcin, the Founder & CEO of EdgeUno, to its Board of Directors. This strategic move underscores TigerDC's commitment to leveraging top talent in the industry. Akcin, who brings with him significant experience from his time at tech giants Yahoo and Microsoft, is poised to contribute valuable insights to TigerDC's operations.

news.headline: Dating industry sees decline post-COVID, impacting US economy.
Ethereum developers in dispute over upcoming upgrades. Two crucial updates being finalized, first milestone nears.
news.summary: Developers of Ethereum are working quickly to complete two important network upgrades, with the initial milestone expected in a matter of days.

DELL NEARS DEAL TO SELL $5 BILLION IN AI SERVERS TO MUSK'S XAT
Zoetis gets USDA conditional license for Avian Influenza Vaccine, H5N2 subtype, for use in chickens.
news.summary: Zoetis, based in Parsippany, N.J., has received a conditional license from the U.S. Department of Agriculture's Center for Veterinary Biologics for its Avian Influenza Vaccine, H5N2 Subtype, Killed Virus designed for chickens. The approval was granted based on safety, purity, and efficacy demonstrations using serology data. This vaccine approval signifies Zoetis' dedication to serving poultry producers with a scientifically-backed solution.

news.headline: EU's growth faces a setback as Trump's tariffs may hinder exports to US, exacerbating economic slowdown.
news.summary: Potential trade conflicts may lead to a decrease in exports to the United States and could hinder investment in Europe, potentially impacting the continent’s already struggling economy. This could further slow down growth in the region.

Gee Heavy Machinery is now an official BOMAG dealer, enhancing its equipment offerings for customers.
news.summary: Gee Heavy Machinery, based in Sacramento, California, is enhancing its equipment offerings by becoming an authorized dealer for BOMAG as of February 14, 2025. This partnership signifies Gee Heavy Machinery’s dedication to providing superior compaction solutions to its customers.

news.headline: Wang & Lee Group partners with City University of Hong Kong for kinetic energy project, revolutionizing sustainable energy.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025 in Hong Kong, Wang & Lee Group, Inc., a prominent publicly traded company focused on sustainability, has revealed a partnership with City University of Hong Kong. This collaboration is set to concentrate on the advancement of kinetic technology. The groundbreaking initiative seeks to convert the energy produced by a sole footstep into sustainable power through cutting-edge energised panels. This endeavor aspires to reshape the realm of renewable energy solutions.

news.headline: Mark Sevco named president of Allegheny Health Network by Highmark Health after 30 years in healthcare leadership.
news.summary: Mark Sevco, the chief operating officer of Sutter Health in Northern California, has been appointed as the president of Highmark Health. With over three decades of experience in health care leadership, Sevco has spent the majority of his career in Pittsburgh. This announcement was made on February 14, 2025.

news.headline: Wonderfront Music & Arts Fest 2025 tickets sale @ 10am pst! Headliners incl Anderson .Paak, Foster the People, Janelle Monae, Portugal. The Man.
news.summary: Anderson .Paak & The Free Nationals, Khruangbin, Peggy Gou, Daniel Caesar, Foster the People, Jason Mraz, Gary Clark Jr., Janelle Monae, Portugal. The Man, Isaiah Rashad, Duke Dumont, and others will be headlining the Wonderfront event in San Diego on February 14, 2025. This highly anticipated festival is set to feature a diverse lineup of artists and is expected to attract a large audience. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting event.

news.headline: BRP and Tread Lightly! launch Responsible Rider Masterclass promoting outdoor recreation stewardship and education. TSX: DOO, NASDAQ: DOOO.
news.summary: Valcourt, Quebec, and North Salt Lake, Utah - On February 14, 2025, BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOOO) and Tread Lightly!, a nonprofit organization from the United States that focuses on promoting responsible outdoor recreation through educational initiatives, have revealed their joint effort. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in their commitment to encourage sustainable outdoor activities.

news.headline: New book "Joy! Growing Strong Throughout Your Seasons of Life as a Teacher and Leader" released by Solution Tree, focusing on keeping joy in work and life.
news.summary: Today in Bloomington, Indiana, Solution Tree, a top provider of professional development resources for educators, has unveiled the release of a new book titled "Joy! Growing Strong Throughout Your Seasons of Life as a Teacher and Leader." This book is authored by an award-winning individual and aims to provide guidance and inspiration to educators. This news was shared on February 14, 2025, and signifies an important development in the education sector.

news.headline: Pinnacle Bankshares Corp announced $2.8M net income for Q4 2024, $9.18M for full year - slight decline from 2023.
news.summary: In Altavista, Virginia, on February 14, 2025, Pinnacle Bankshares Corporation (OTCQX: PPBN), the holding company for First National Bank, reported a net income of $2,800,000, equivalent to $1.27 per basic and diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2024. The total net income for the year ending on December 31, 2024, was $9,178,000, translating to $4.15 per basic and diluted share. This marks an improvement from the same periods in 2023, where net income was $2,279,000 ($1.04 per basic and diluted share) for the fourth quarter and $9,762,000 ($4.45 per basic and diluted share) for the full year. The financial results for 2024 have not been audited.

news.headline: Consumers Energy declares quarterly dividend on preferred stock; payable April 1, 2025 to shareholders of record.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Jackson, Michigan on February 14, 2025, Consumers Energy's Board of Directors, a principal subsidiary of CMS Energy, declared a quarterly dividend on the Utility's preferred stock. Shareholders of record at the close of business will receive this dividend, which is payable on April 1, 2025.

$270+ million Live! Casino & Hotel opens in Louisiana; first land-side casino in Shreveport-Bossier market.
news.summary: Executives from Cordish and Live!, along with elected officials, community leaders, and sports icons, celebrated the grand opening of the first land-side casino in the Shreveport-Bossier market. This new world-class destination offers a top-notch gaming, dining, entertainment, and hotel experience, catering to visitors from the four-state region.

news.headline: GovCIO Media & Research to honor leading federal officials at CyberScape Summit, recognizing accomplishments in cybersecurity.
news.summary: In Fairfax, Virginia on February 14, 2025, GovCIO Media & Research revealed the finalists for the prestigious CyberScape Flywheel Awards. This esteemed program acknowledges the achievements of federal leaders who are at the forefront of transforming cybersecurity. It is a platform recognizing excellence in this critical field, highlighting the innovative efforts of individuals working to enhance national security.

news.headline: Trump to approve the gas export project after lifting the Biden pause.
Flowserve (NYSE: FLS) to attend investor events on Feb 20 and 27 at Citi Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference.
news.summary: Flowserve Corporation, a prominent player in flow control products and services for global infrastructure markets, recently disclosed its involvement in forthcoming investor events. Specifically, the company will take part in investor meetings at the Citi 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference in Miami on February 20th. Following this, on February 27th, Amy Schwetz, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Flowserve (NYSE: FLS), will participate in another event.

news.headline: Dow drops 100 points as industrial output rises in Jan; Energy shares jump 0.7%; WeRide Inc. shares rise by 82%.
news.summary: During midday trading on Friday, U.S. stocks saw a mixed performance as the Dow Jones index dropped over 100 points to 44,605.35, marking a 0.24% decline. The NASDAQ, however, edged up slightly by 0.03% to 19,951.12, while the S&P 500 fell by 0.06% to 6,111.64. Energy shares surged by 0.7%, while consumer staples shares dipped by 0.9%. U.S. industrial production increased by 0.5% in January compared to a revised 1% rise in December. WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD) witnessed a notable 82% surge to $31.33 after Nvidia revealed a stake of 1.74 million shares. In related news, Jet.AI Inc (NASDAQ: Full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ITC prohibits importation of power modules infringing Vicor's patents (9,516,761 and 9,166,481) into the US.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Vicor Corporation disclosed that the International Trade Commission (ITC) released a Notice of Final Determination on February 13 regarding Investigation No. 337-TA-1370. This investigation pertained to certain Power Converter Modules and Computing Systems that house these modules. The ITC's determination affirmed that Vicor's U.S. Patent Nos. 9,516,761 and 9,166,481 are legitimate and have been infringed upon. Consequently, the ruling mandates that unauthorized computing systems containing the infringing power modules must not be imported into the United States. Vicor Corporation's stock is listed under NASDAQ with the ticker symbol VICR.

Experts discuss Ethereum's recent underperformance and potential for resurgence in 2025 in a new video analysis.
news.summary: A recent analysis video from Cointelegraph delves into the reasons for Ether's lackluster performance and delves into the possibility of a resurgence by 2025.

news.headline: Oldcastle APG buys Gardenscape facilities in Ohio & Pennsylvania, expanding Midwest & East Coast presence.
news.summary: Oldcastle APG, a subsidiary of CRH Company, recently revealed the purchase of two Gardenscape bagging plants situated in Archbold, Ohio, and Emlenton, Pennsylvania. By adding these facilities from Gardenscape, a supplier of bulk and bagged mulches and soils, Oldcastle APG aims to widen its presence geographically and provide more options for customers in the Midwest and along the East Coast. This move signifies a positive expansion for the Oldcastle APG family and will enhance its offerings in key regions.

news.headline: Calian announces voting results: Annual meeting held on Feb 13, 2025 in Ottawa, Ontario.
news.summary: Calian Group Ltd. announced the results of the election of directors vote at its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on February 13, 2025, in Ottawa, Ontario. Shareholders cast their votes to elect directors for the upcoming term. The meeting saw participation from a significant number of shareholders, with a record-high turnout of X%. The votes were tallied, and the elected directors will play a crucial role in guiding the company's strategic decisions in the coming year.

news.headline: FTK Construction Services receives $13.6 million contract for Dallas LIHTC Project. Launches rehab for West Virginia Apartments.
news.summary: A project for the rehabilitation of West Virginia Apartments has been initiated by FTK Construction Services in Allen, Texas. The endeavor aims to provide affordable housing solutions and improve the living conditions of the residents. This development highlights the commitment of FTK Construction Services towards addressing the housing needs in the area. The project is set to benefit a significant number of individuals by revitalizing the apartments and ensuring better accommodation standards.

news.headline: The Swing Bays franchise is expanding with five new locations in North Carolina's Raleigh-Durham area.
news.summary: Veteran franchise professionals are set to introduce five branches of a popular golf and fitness franchise in the Raleigh-Durham Metro area. The Swing Bays, a fast-growing franchise, will be expanding its presence in North Carolina with the addition of these five new locations. This move is part of their strategic efforts to capitalize on the demand for golf and fitness services in the region. The announcement was made on Feb. 14, 2025, marking a major step in the franchise's expansion plan.

news.headline: PG&E holds line on Q4 EPS with $0.31, 2024 adjusted EPS $1.36. Operating cash flow at $8.0B in 2024, up from $4.7B in 2023. Non-fuel O&M costs decreased by 4% in 2024.
news.summary: Shares of Pacific Gas & Electric Co. (NYSE:PCG) are experiencing a decline in trading on Friday following the company's fourth-quarter earnings report. The report revealed an adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.31, consistent with market expectations.In 2024, PG&E disclosed an adjusted EPS of $1.36, a rise from the $1.23 recorded in 2023. This growth was supported by increased customer capital investment, as authorized in the 2023 General Rate Case final decision, which yields an equity return exceeding the cost of capital proceeding.The company's operating cash flow for 2024 amounted to $8.0 billion, marking an increase from the $4.7 billion reported in 2023. Furthermore, non-fuel operating and maintenance (O&M) costs saw a 4% reduction in 2024, surpassing the initial 2% target. Notably, PG&E achieved savings exceeding $200 million in non-fuel O&M expenses.For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sahil Arora issued a fake dog coin representing Binance founder CZ’s dog, using Caitlyn Jenner's deployer wallet, tricking buyers.
news.summary: Following Binance founder's dog being featured in a post, Sahil Arora designed a token based on it, utilizing the JENNER deployer wallet. Subsequently, he sold off the token to purchasers.

news.headline: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. reported fourth quarter net income of $2.65 million ($0.57/share) and $10.40 million ($2.28/share) for full year 2024.
news.summary: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc., based in Coldwater, Michigan, revealed that in the fourth quarter of 2025, they achieved a net income of $2,650,000 equating to $0.57 per share, showcasing growth from $2,437,000 or $0.54 per share in the fourth quarter of 2023. For the entire year of 2024, they reported earnings of $10,402,000 or $2.28 per share, as opposed to the previous year's $10,905,000 or $2.40 per share.

news.headline: Survey by InsureMyTrip shows 79% travelers fear illness/injury abroad, but only 41% know health insurance coverage.
news.summary: In a survey conducted by InsureMyTrip in Warwick, Rhode Island on February 14, 2025, it was found that there is a significant disparity in travel preparedness among international travelers. The survey indicated that 79% of travelers fear falling ill or getting injured while abroad. Surprisingly, only 41% of travelers were aware of whether their...

news.headline: El Salvador's President Bukele met Michael Saylor to discuss Bitcoin adoption; details undisclosed.
news.summary: El Presidente de El Salvador, Nayib Bukele, se reunió el jueves en el palacio presidencial del país con el cofundador de MicroStrategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), Michael Saylor, según la Oficina Nacional de Bitcoin del país. Aunque no se revelaron detalles específicos de su conversación, el encuentro unió a dos de los partidarios más elocuentes de Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) en un momento en que El Salvador está ajustando sus políticas de criptomonedas. Bukele compartió una foto de la cena en redes sociales, y la Oficina Nacional de Bitcoin luego publicó imágenes adicionales. Saylor también tuiteó fotos del encuentro, indicando que la discusión se centró en cómo El Salvador podría beneficiarse y acelerar la "adopción global de Bitcoin". Al mismo tiempo, El Salvador añadió un Bitcoin a su reserva ... El contenido completo está disponible en Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TCRC-MWED approves new 4-year agreement with CPKC, representing engineering employees in Canada.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on February 14, 2025, Canadian Pacific Kansas City announced that the Teamsters Canada Rail Conference Maintenance of Way Employees Division, which represents engineering service workers in Canada, has approved a new four-year agreement. Canadian Pacific Kansas City is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CP) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CP) under the symbol CPKC.
